claims.claim: In a deterministic trace-level simulation over synthetic single-hop and two-fact multi-hop retrieval contexts (32,768 tokens, 256 queries, 10 seeds), the retrieval-landmark pinning policy achieves modeled exact-match quality within 2 percentage points of full-KV residency at a 512-token budget (98.4% footprint reduction) when retriever recall is 0.99.
